description: Employee entity for the HR Essentials template. Demonstrates state machine lifecycle for employee status transitions.
semantic_description: An employee record representing a person employed by the organization. Tracks personal info, department, position, and employment status through a lifecycle from active employment through leave to resignation.
lifecycle_description: active → ON_LEAVE (↔ active) → RESIGNED; active → RESIGNED

description: Attendance record for tracking daily check-in/check-out times and attendance classification.
semantic_description: A daily attendance record for an employee, capturing check-in and check-out times and classifying the attendance type (normal, late, early leave, absent). Used for payroll and performance tracking.
lifecycle_description: Created → Updated → Deleted (no status machine; type is a classification field, not a lifecycle state)

description: Leave request entity with approval workflow. Demonstrates multi-target state transitions and preconditioned deletion.
semantic_description: A leave request submitted by an employee, specifying leave type, duration, and reason. Goes through an approval workflow from pending to approved/rejected, or can be cancelled by the requester.
